field.title:
-- Если ру-акк
IF [account_id] = 53859 THEN
    URL('https://bneginskogo.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/'...
field.formula:
-- Если ру-акк
IF [account_id] = 53859 THEN
    URL('https://bneginskogo.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/' + STR([crm_id]), STR([crm_id]))

ELSEIF [account_id] = 57817 OR [account_id] = 54744 THEN
    URL('https://bneginskogoeng.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/' + STR([crm_id]), STR([crm_id]))

ELSEIF [account_id] = 55639 THEN
    URL('https://bneginskogomsk.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/' + STR([crm_id]), STR([crm_id]))

END
field.guid_formula:
-- Если ру-акк
IF [account_id_aswz] = 53859 THEN
    URL('https://bneginskogo.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/' + STR([crm_id_hi2l]), STR([crm_id_hi2l]))

ELSEIF [account_id_aswz] = 57817 OR [account_id_aswz] = 54744 THEN
    URL('https://bneginskogoeng.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/' + STR([crm_id_hi2l]), STR([crm_id_hi2l]))

ELSEIF [account_id_aswz] = 55639 THEN
    URL('https://bneginskogomsk.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/' + STR([crm_id_hi2l]), STR([crm_id_hi2l]))

END
